title: Cosmos Remix — Orbiting Rings you can retune and reskin live
summary: A remixable particle effect: concentric orbiting rings of evenly-spaced particles whose radius grows with ring index, each ring rotating at a different speed in alternating directions while gently breathing in radius. A live glass panel retunes palette / shape / density / spread / speed / size plus a Rings knob, and the field reskins to any brand colour in one click. Self-contained, zero-dependency single HTML file; ?auto=1 hides the panel and exposes a deterministic seamless loop for capture.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html in any modern browser; the glass control panel appears top-right. PANEL: pick a Palette swatch (brand skin) and a Shape, then drag Density (particle count), Spread (radial spacing), Speed (orbit rate), Dot size, and Rings (how many concentric rings); Seed cycles palette + spread, Copy exports the tuned config JSON. KEY TECHNIQUES: the geometry places P.count particles across P.rings concentric circles — radius is proportional to ring index, each ring orbits at a speed scaled by its radius in an alternating direction (dir = ri%2 ? -1 : 1), and a sin(u·2π·2) term makes each ring breathe in radius so frame(0)===frame(LOOP); the PARAMS convention exposes every knob via window.__params and applies edits through window.setParam(key,value); PALETTES are theme tokens (accent + 3-colour ramp) consumed by ramp(cols,t); SHAPES ['dot','ruby','atom','star','crystal','spark'] are drawn cheaply by drawShape(). CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: raise Rings + Density for a dense orrery, lower Rings + raise Spread for a few wide sweeping orbits.
